int string RESULT_CODE_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND 0x7f140001
int string RESULT_CODE_INITIALIZED 0x7f140002
int string RESULT_CODE_INVALID_PARAMETER 0x7f140003
int string RESULT_CODE_NOT_DEFINED 0x7f140004
int string RESULT_CODE_NOT_ENOUGH_CACHE 0x7f140005
int string RESULT_CODE_NOT_INITIALIZED 0x7f140006
int string RESULT_CODE_NOT_SUPPORTED 0x7f140007
int string RESULT_CODE_PERMISSION_DENIED 0x7f140008
int string RESULT_CODE_SUCCESS 0x7f140009
int string RESULT_CODE_TIMEOUT 0x7f14000a
int string RESULT_CODE_TRANSPORT_FAILED 0x7f14000b
int string RESULT_CODE_UNKNOWN 0x7f14000c
